label: Simpler, calmer navigation
items: Journal and Notes now share one screen — flip between them with a single tap instead of hunting through the menu.
Quick Add is trimmed to the five things you reach for most, and gains a new “Diagnose a Plant” shortcut that jumps straight to the Plant Doctor.
Tidied the menus so the highlighted tab always matches the screen you’re on.

label: Consistent naming
items: Your recurring care schedules are now called “Routines” everywhere in the app.
The plant identify-and-diagnose tool is “Plant Doctor” throughout — one name, no surprises.
